titles.title: Pure Heart/ A Heart Like Yours

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: A pure heart, that's what I long for, A heart that follows hard after thee.

verse.name: V2
V3
verse.lines: A heart that beats compassion, That pleases You, my Lord; A sweet aroma of worship That rises to Your throne.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: A heart like yours, is my desire A heart like yours, is what I am searching for Full of compassion, nothing wrong within Please hear me Lord, give me a heart like yours

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: So much grace, so much kindness So much faith, for ever true Strong as the wind, soft as the shadows If just once, I could be like you

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: A heart like yours, is my desire A heart like yours, is what I am searching for Full of compassion, nothing wrong within Please hear me Lord, give me a heart like yours

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Full of compassion, nothing wrong within Please hear me Lord, give me a heart like yours Please hear me Lord, give me a heart like yours
